sample_values: Honestly it's amazing for open world exploration, building teams, and connecting with people. There's always tutorials on YT for quests you don't understand if you need it, and I do understand Honkais the favorite child, but you can actually dodge in genshin! :D I absolutely love the characters, each one has been thought over well and has a unique design
I've been having a lot of fun I like how the game treats its new players makes eazy to understand.
after 5 long years, they finally added controller support..... Domains are still locked to certain weekdays, and there's no flying like in Wuthering Waves. Go playing Wuthering Waves people
so I downloaded this game randomly and I was shocked after knowing that the size of game 🥲
